purpose: Define the extra label-free evidence required before any residual partial relation-depth branch can be promoted toward terminal utility validation.

promotion_policy.target_question: What additional evidence would turn a nonterminal branch outcome into a promotable terminal-utility candidate?
global_requirements: one frozen branch-family contract before implementation
candidate commit and rejection remain disabled during the requirement/probe step
at least one simpler alternative must be predeclared per branch family
failure interpretation must separate visibility, association, relation-depth, and repeated-instance ambiguity
positive detector/depth/mask evidence alone is never enough for terminal utility
promotion_policy.priority_reason: The repeated-object branch is the dominant residual slice by source branch rows and directly targets the repeated-instance/anchor ambiguity mechanism.

required_extra_evidence: candidate association must recover after the specific anchor or direction repair
relation-depth evidence must improve relative to the failed completion view
candidate-specific support must be independent of category-only visibility
same-request rival or anchor conflict must be absent under the frozen action-time rule
association_geometry_underlink.first_probe_shape: Run a bounded repair-followup evidence analyzer for the two association-geometry rows, preserving the relation-anchor selection and direction-specific repair split.
association_geometry_underlink.promotion_blocker_now: Current evidence only shows repairability of view/anchor geometry, not ObjectNav goal validity.

required_extra_evidence: relation-anchor to candidate assignment must be stable across at least two independent observation roles
one candidate must have conflict-free candidate-specific support while same-category rivals do not
depth-consistent signal must be candidate-associated rather than only mask or scene-level depth support
orthogonal relation-axis evidence must not contradict the selected candidate-anchor assignment
repeated_object_relation_anchor_ambiguit.first_probe_shape: Design a repeated-object relation-anchor consistency evidence contract for the three bxsVRursffK/plant requests before any terminal utility.
repeated_object_relation_anchor_ambiguit.promotion_blocker_now: The same requests contain association-positive, association-zero, depth-signal-not-associated, and mask-only rows across repeated candidates.

required_extra_evidence: independent observation must change the relation-depth state instead of repeating the stagnant counts
candidate-specific support must remain stable after the independent observation
map-side or pose-side consistency evidence must explain why the stagnant depth signal is still useful
if depth remains stagnant, the branch must stay nonterminal
depth_stagnation.first_probe_shape: Keep this as a lower-priority one-row probe until the repeated-object and association-geometry families define promotable evidence.
depth_stagnation.promotion_blocker_now: Association and depth consistency are present but unchanged from prior evidence, so the row cannot justify commit or rejection.

interpretation_rule.fact: Residual branch synthesis found no promotable terminal outcome rows.
interpretation_rule.agent_inference: The next method component should be a repeated-object relation-anchor consistency evidence contract. Terminal utility remains blocked until at least one family-level requirement is satisfied by a label-free probe.
